title: Daylite
description: A Minecraft mod for 1.21.5+ that allows the user to set seamless transitions between different light levels in different environments.
body:
DayLite is a lightweight Fabric mod for Minecraft Java 1.21.5+ that allows for simple brightness transitions to be configured between different environments.

Want the rich shadows of moody brightness without being blind at night? Want to be able to see ores in caves without blinding youself on the surface? You can have both!

Dynamic Brightness Controls aims to replace the vanilla brightness settings, allowing you to set gamma values for different environments, which will be automatically transitioned into! Adjust  the config screen through Mod Menu to your liking and enjoy!
